problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: Combining Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
